name: Soft Clay
description: Gives versatile definition and great texture. Provides a matte finish for thickening and control of the hair.
ingredients: Aqua, Kaolin, Petrolatum, VP/VA Copolymer, Cetyl Alcohol, Lanolin, Ceteareth-20, Copernicia Cerifera (Carnauba) Wax, Ozokerite, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Paraffinum Liquidum, Alcohol Denat, Benzyl Alcohol, Dehydroacetic Acid, Parfum, Sodium Gluconate, Amyl Cinnamal, Benzyl Benzoate, Coumarin, Hexyl Cinnam-aldehyde, d'Limonene.
